/usr/bin/g++-11 -O3 CMakeFiles/MiracleVision.dir/MiracleVision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MiracleVision.dir/__/utils/plotter.cpp.o -o ../bin/MiracleVision  -Wl,-rpath,/home/prototype152/EX_MiracleVision/build/lib:/home/prototype152/EX_MiracleVision/build/devices:/home/prototype152/EX_MiracleVision/3rdparty/mindvision/linux/lib/x64:/home/prototype152/EX_MiracleVision/build/module:/home/prototype152/EX_MiracleVision/build/utils:/home/prototype152/EX_MiracleVision/build/module/foxglove_publisher:/usr/local/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so.12.5 ../devices/libmv-video-capture.so ../devices/libmv-uart-serial.so ../module/libmv-basic-armor.so ../module/libmv-dnn-armor.so ../module/libmv-basic-buff.so ../module/libmv-new-buff.so ../module/libmv-angle-solve.so ../module/libmv-basic-kalman.so ../module/libmv-basic-roi.so ../module/libmv-onnx-inferring.so ../module/libmv-camera-calibration.so ../module/libmv-predictor.so ../utils/libmv-img-tools.so ../utils/libmv-plotter.so ../module/foxglove_publisher/libmv-foxglove-publisher.so /usr/local/lib/libonnxruntime.so ../../3rdparty/mindvision/linux/lib/x64/libMVSDK.so ../module/libmv-fan-armor.so ../module/libmv-basic-pnp.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.5 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.5 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.5
